title: Airtel India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Airtel India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Airtel India Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About Airtel India Capital India:
Airtel India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India Capital India!
